info.description: Backend API for Spatial Memory Network - an AR app that lets users pin multimedia memories to real-world geographic locations.
info.title: Spatial Memory Network API

get.description: Get the list of memories pending moderation review

parameters.description: Filter by status: pending, approved, rejected
parameters.name: status

get.description: Get statistics about the moderation queue
Get a single moderation item by ID

put.description: Manually approve or reject a moderation item

post.description: Revoke the refresh token and logout
Get a new access token using a refresh token
Send a 6-digit verification code to the given phone number
Verify the SMS code and return access/refresh tokens
Create a new friend circle for sharing memories

get.description: Get a list of circles the user is a member of
Get a list of circles owned by the current user

put.description: Update a circle's name or description

get.description: Get a list of members in a circle

post.description: Add a user to a friend circle

delete.description: Remove a user from a friend circle

get.description: Check the health status of the API and its dependencies

post.description: Create a new memory at a geographic location

get.description: Get a paginated list of the authenticated user's memories
Find memories near a geographic location

parameters.description: Sort by: distance, recent, popular (default: distance)
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Enable clustering for large result sets
parameters.name: cluster

get.description: Get a memory's details by its ID

put.description: Update a memory's title, content, or visibility

delete.description: Soft delete a memory by ID

post.description: Grant access to a memory for all members of a circle
Grant access to a memory for a specific user
Add a like to a memory (toggle)

delete.description: Remove a like from a memory

post.description: Report a memory for moderation review
Remove access for a circle or user
Create a shareable token for accessing a memory
Confirm that a file has been uploaded to R2 and create media record
Get a pre-signed URL for direct upload to R2 storage

get.description: Get the authenticated user's profile information

put.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information

get.description: Get a public user profile by ID

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
